programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winning choreographer Travis Wall tests the hopefuls' contemporary dance skills, Kelli and Judy make show group selections, and Melissa Rycroft teaches injury prevention.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A veterinary technician chases her dream, Kelli has an uncomfortable conversation about an applicant's weight, and the women explore their new city.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Some candidates struggle to adapt to the larger stage when they finally hit the field to learn the DCC entrance, and Miranda is unnerved by criticism of her hair.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With so many strong candidates, Kelli realizes some of the cuts may not be dance-based, and media simulation day proves to be problematic for a few of the candidates.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC hopefuls try on the iconic uniform for cameos, show off their hip-hop skills for celebrity choreographer Marty Kudelka and learn table manners in an etiquette class.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the first football game approaches, Kelli and Judy watch tape on AT&T Stadium's famously large HD screens to see who is game day-ready -- and figure out the final cuts.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The investigation into the disappearance of a Marine's 19-year-old wife reveals a secret love triangle and multiple suspects.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Motivational speaker Rebecca Musser talks about her life in The Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints and what made her leave the denomination.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When Tom Foley becomes the top suspect in his wife's murder, he spends the next two years trying to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man charged with murder claims he was too fat to have committed the crime; a man's double life is exposed after his wife is killed in a car accident.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Co-lead investigator in the Steven Avery case Tom Fassbender discusses the case and allegations investigators coerced Avery's nephew, Brendan Dassey, into making a false confession.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Oscar Pistorius shoots and kills his girlfriend just eight months after competing in the London Olympics, telling police that he believed she was an intruder, and he was acting in self-defense.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a woman disappears after an encounter on a train, her family hires detectives to investigate.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: As Hurricane Charley ravages a small town in Florida, a man trying to avoid his past hides out in a hotel room.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When Cara Ryan shoots her ex-husband and accuses him of threatening to kill her, police question her motive.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a San Antonio man shoots his wife, he claims to have shot her after mistaking her for an intruder.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Detectives connect a series of seemingly random crimes to crack the case of a missing young man.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A teen driver discusses what happened the night she was involved in a car crash that left a pregnant woman and her son dead; authorities try to determine if the incident was an accident or intentional.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A mother in Pennsylvania disappears after co-workers see her leaving for lunch.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Flav is so smitten with the remaining nine girls that he's going to marry them!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Neverwed Game
programme.desc: The remaining seven girls are in for a big surprise when they find themselves on the set of the first ever “Neverwed Game” starring Arsenio Hall as the host and their own ex-boyfriends!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: When Flavorettes Attack
programme.desc: Flav bring his five remaining girls to "Big Boy's Neighborhood" on LA's biggest Hip Hop Radio Station to have live callers help him decide which girl is right for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Its A Family Flav Fair
programme.desc: With only four women left vying for Flav's affection the moment of truth has arrived, meeting the parents.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Von Boyage
programme.desc: After the last elimination, Flav tells his final three girls to pack their bags because they are heading to Cannes, France!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Clip Show
programme.desc: Episode 14 is a clip show with never before seen footage.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Parlez Vous Flavor
programme.desc: After a season of ups and downs and a dramatic twist of plans in Cannes, it's down to Flav's final girls.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Reunion After The Lovin
programme.desc: On the reunion episode, Flav and 20 girls talk about what happened on the show and what is going on in the lives right now.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Every buddy needs somebody and Vinny is ready for love. After seeing love spark for Pauly and Nikki, Vinny is willing to try this crazy experiment all over again. But when he meets the ladies will his nerves get the best of him?

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Nikki have a not so welcome surprise for Vinny, a visit from his ex, Maria. Sparks will fly but will they be the good kind or the bad kind. Vinny shares a kiss with someone special.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly takes Vinny and all ladies camping. After learning that Vinny has already kissed someone in the house, a few ladies get are determined to get the second kiss. Someone realizes that Vinny might not be for them.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly sets up the perfect date spot when he brings the Jersey Shore Boardwalk to the desert. Vinny finds the lady who can help him do the unthinkable, prank Pauly. A shocking elimination leaves Vinny without an appetite.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Shared kisses cause jealousy amongst the women. But all bets are off when Angelina arrives and introduces Vinny to two new ladies. Tempers flare when Angelina brings out another side to some of the ladies.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Facing elimination, one woman makes a shocking move and what Vinny does next upsets the whole house. Pauly gets Vinny to reveal his sensitive and artistic side.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s world is rocked when Paige drops a bomb – her dad’s going to help her buy a condo. Ellie’s just learned she might be up for the editorship of the Core newspaper, so she’s distracted.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jimmy have just one more exam before they’re finally done school and, with Jimmy's help, Spinner's sure he can pass and enjoy his cancer-free future.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With time ticking towards the Class of ’07 Prom and Graduation ceremony, Liberty has the perfect night planned: a hotel prom, with the amazing Natasha Bedingfield performing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Relieved of parental duty for the year by mom, Mia starts the school year off with a bang by bonding with new girl, Leia, and getting scouted to be the new face of football star Tom Blakes’ shoe line.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia does what she can to ensure her success. Besides, Tom is handsome and famous, so Mia thinks being with Tom to get ahead isn’t such a bad trade.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane wants to play football but since there is no girls team, then boys’ football it is. The Shep doesn’t like the idea one bit, but once Jane proves she’s faster, stronger, and more athletic than most of the team, he relents…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eager to make the most of her college experience, Liberty jumps at the chance to rush the most popular sorority at Smithdale. Determined to get in, Liberty slowly exchanges old habits and old friends (Manny and Emma) for sorority approved ones.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter begins a relationship with Mia and a friendship with Riley. Finding a balance between a new girlfriend and a new guy friend gets confusing, especially when Riley is suddenly kissing Peter.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya plan to celebrate their six-month anniversary on the school’s overnight trip. Only problem? Alli, Sav’s sister, convinces their parents to let her go on the trip on the condition that Sav spends every second with her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s T-Bombz campaign is hitting the city and Degrassi. But Holly J has bigger and better things going on. She’s prepping the Power Squad for an out-of-town competition, and things are looking good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate to win Jane back, Spinner sneaks into the Leadership Convention Jane is speaking at and proposes. When Jane turns him down, Spinner breaks up with her – nothing he does is ever good enough.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s the star of Degrassi’s first-ever football game win! The Shep is floored at how much Riley’s improved.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare stands up for Connor when he receives unfair treatment from The Shep. The result of their peaceful protest? Detentions for everyone. No one is more frustrated by the detention than Alli. It wasn’t her idea to protest.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pushed to the edge by Holly J, Alli begins posting nasty things about her on the “anti-Grapevine” blog, the underground school on-line site.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Shep has returned after his sensitivity training and it’s Spirit Week at Degrassi! However spirits are anything but high at home for Jane as she struggles to get her dropout brother Lucas off the couch.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane admits to herself that her issues with her dad go deeper than the divorce – she thinks maybe he did things to her. Jane is very confused and feels alone. Lucas gives Jane a hard time for creating tension between mom and dad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s tired of being referred to as Kelly’s girlfriend and Blonde Emma – she’s not even blonde anymore! Determined to create a distinct university identity, Emma borrows some pot that was gifted to Kelly and smokes up with Becca and Gwyneth.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli wants Johnny to like her, a lot. She worries she’s going to lose him to an older more “experienced” girl so to make sure she keeps her man close, Alli decides to play with the big kids at a ravine party.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Stress is at an all-time high at Degrassi with exams approaching and course selections due for next term.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Blue asks Holly J to the winter dance in a very romantic way. Only problem? Holly J thinks she might have a thing for her co-worker, Spinner. While Blue is a dreamboat, Spinner is a goofball.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Mia is offered a MAJOR modeling contract in Paris, Peter decides he’ll go with her. But he soon realizes he doesn’t fit into her sophisticated world.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Peter discovers his recreational drug was not-so-recreational meth, he swears he’ll never touch the stuff again. But with the reality of coming down, Peter realizes he just wants more.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As preparations for the hospital's Christamas party swing into high gear, Claude, a popular hospital maintenance man, who each year portrays Santa Claus at the big bash, collapses.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan finds himself needing a vacation from his vacation when his plans for a relaxing trip abroad a cruise liner as a doctor is turned upside down as a family finds their father has been murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda have brough their kids to the set of Frontier Dad, a popular western TV series, to watch the filming of an action sequence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan must solve the murder of renowned chef Rene Fontenot, however, with Rene being a ladies man and a successful chef with many competitors, the list of suspects keeps growing and Amanda finds herself among the accused.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan finds himself in the middle of another murder investigation that hits too close to home.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan finds himself in unfamiliar territory when a string of murders seem to be connected to a state of the art computer system and its not so stable inventor and owner Bruce Locatelli.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Steve return home from a fishing trip to a shocking discovery - the bloody and beaten body of Mickey, the young medical student who, along with his wife Jill, also a medical student, had been house-sitting for them.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve reluctantly goes on a dating game show and wins. Much to his pleasnat surprise, his date appears to be everything he's looking for and more.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve gets an unexpected phone call from Hawk, an old friend from the police force who has recently retired and moved into the Sunny Meadows rest home.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Marine Lt. Hank Thomas enters BBQ Bob's, the favorite lunchtime hangout of the doctors, wielding a gun in his left hand and threatening three other Marines who are already there.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Paraplegic, asthmatic game show contestant Sol Singer climbs into his specially-modified van and sets out to a TV studio where he is bout to compete on the live quiz show "Through the Roof."

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dear friend and famous pop singer Danielle Marsh comes from new York to stay with Mark and Steve while she prepares for a big comeback conecrt.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The murder of a young woman brings Alex into contact with her roommate Amy Saroyan, Alex's former girlfriend whom he has not seen in many years.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While a deliriously happy Madison helps new love Brett Hayward move in with her, Steve investigates the brutal slaying of palastic surgeon Dr. Yordsberg.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unpredictable world, the ancient powers must lay down the foundations of their societies to show their strength, protect their people and ultimately build their way to glory.

programme.title: Ancient Powers

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Clash
programme.desc: Trinh, a mercenary, must complete a series of organized crime jobs for her boss in order to win the release of her kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: Furie

programme.title: No Mercy

programme.title: The Villainess
programme.desc: Bloody revenge is at the heart of this stylish action-thriller that doses the classic femme fatale story with a shot of adrenaline as it follows a former assassin who will stop at nothing to cut ties to her past.

programme.title: Memories of the Sword
programme.desc: While in medieval Korea, a young girl sets out to revenge the betrayal and the death of her mother. But therefore she must face one of the most powerful men and warriors of the Goryo Dynasty.

programme.title: Rampant
programme.desc: Returning from imprisonment abroad, a prince and his fellow countrymen band together to battle bloodthirsty demons in ancient Korea.

programme.title: The Swordsman
programme.desc: After being blinded in a coup against the king, Joseon’s greatest swordsman goes into hiding, far removed from his city’s anguish. But when traffickers kidnap his daughter, he has no choice but to unsheathe his sword once more.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 12, 1994, Crystal Perry was viciously murdered in her home in Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32, was later found guilty in the slaying.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This examination of the role autopsies play in murder investigations focuses on the suspicious death of Virginia Ridley. Police charge her mentally unstable husband with murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the early hours of a morning just before Christmas, a college student was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment. Her body was found later that day; she had been sexually assaulted and shot at point-blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two boys are brutally attacked, investigators rely on evidence fished out of a nearby pond. It became the first case where diatom analysis was used to place a suspect at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, when off-duty Maine State Trooper Vicky Gardner is attacked by Steven Fortin during a routine stop, it triggers a chain of events which jumpstart a stalled murder case in New Jersey.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Brian and Beverly Mauck were found dead in their Graham, Washington home. Using a bloody palm print and shoe prints at the scene, investigators focus their attention on Daniel Tavares, who had previously inked a tattoo on Brian's back.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.desc: Ethel is jealous of Lucy's friendship with neighbor Betty Ramsey. Sensitive to this, Lucy decides that the three of them should have a nice lunch together. Although reticent at first, Ethel opens up to Betty upon hearing they are both from Albuquerque.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy must get vacationing Ricky out of her hair so she can do her housework. She and Ethel trick their husbands into building a brick barbecue on the Ricardo patio by first pretending to build it themselves.

programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes go with their neighbors, Ralph and Betty Ramsey, to the country club dance where a pretty visitor quickly convinces the men they are Romeos in disguise. They are each taken with Diana, the young beautiful cousin of a neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Suburbanite Lucy gets a green thumb and a competitive spirit. She has been raising tulips with a vengeance and wants to dethrone her neighbor Betty Ramsey for "Best Looking Garden" in the local garden club competition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The town of Westport has commissioned a statue of a Minuteman to commemorate the Revolutionary War. The whole town is involved, from Fred who will serve as town crier to Ricky who will make the dedication speech.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York

programme.desc: Rich makes a proposal to Peter as K. Michelle takes control of her tour. Tahiry's sister brings tragic news, while an exhausted Yandy confronts her business partner. Erica realizes signing her contract might have been a huge mistake. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York

programme.desc: Tahiry and Rashidah clash while Erica Mena and a new rival fight for territory. Joe decides to stake his claim as Tara and K. Michelle take the plunge on a double date. Rich finally admits his love. Presented by VH1.

programme.desc: Joe proposes to Tahiry in Times Square as Rich confronts Erica Mena and Cyn in the studio. Saigon and Erica Jean get a blessing while Peter and Amina have a kid crisis. Yandy stays strong while Tara calls it quits. Presented by VH1.

programme.desc: Calamardo le cuenta a Bob una historia de terror para burlarse de él. Luego de asustarlo, Calamardo le dice la verdad a Bob. / Don Cangrejo conoce a la Señora Puff y se enamora de ella, esto le provoca que gaste su dinero sin control.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: La Señora Puff deja de tarea hacer un ensayo acerca de que no hacer ante una luz de parada. Pero a Bob Esponja no se le ocurren ideas. / Patricio recibe la visita de sus padres, pero quiere que ya no piensen que es un despistado.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio conocen una nueva palabra y la empiezan a decir una y otra vez sin saber que es una mala palabra. / Calamardo comienza a dar clases de arte, y Bob Esponja es tan bueno que hace una gran estatua.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo descubre que la jalea de medusa en las Cangreburguers le gusta mucho a los clientes. / Bob Esponja y Patricio se vuelven contrincantes en la batalla más importante de comida.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo y Bob Esponja hacen una huelga en el Crustáceo Cascarudo. / Una enorme lombriz ataca a Fondo de Bikini y Arenita decide enfrentarla sola sin escuchar las advertencias de Bob.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Plankton inventa una máquina que le permite intercambiar vidas con Don Cangrejo / Bob Esponja se ofrece como voluntario para el empleo como Guarda Vidas, el único problema es que no sabe nadar

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja, Patricio y Calamardo se encuentran perdidos, con solo una caracola mágica para guiarlos / Es Primavera en Fondo de Bikini y Bob Esponja encuentra un salvaje caballo de mar y decide quedarse con ella

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja le ofrece varias veces a Calamardo probar una Cangreburger. Él se niega hasta que descubre que le gustan / Hay un nuevo alumno en la clase de botes, y quiere patearle el trasero a Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Un Inspector de salud aparece en el Crustáceo Cascarudo. Bob y Don Cangrejo ven en las noticias que hay alguien que está haciendo pasar por Inspector / Bob y Patricio compran una pantalla de televisión sólo para usar la caja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: A Tritón se le cae su cinturón, Bob lo encuentra e intenta devolverlo. A causa de un pequeño accidente, Bob Esponja encoge todo Fondo de Bikini / Una vez más la Señora Puff vuelve a manejar con Bob, quien choca contra un camión de jugo

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Comienza a nevar en Fondo de Bikini y todos sus habitantes salen a jugar en la nieve. Bob Esponja, Patricio y Calamardo hacen una guerra de bolas de nieve / Don Cangrejo le vende a Bob Esponja un sombrero por poco dinero

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja aparece por un segundo en un anuncio del Crustáceo Cascarudo. Al día siguiente Bob está convencido que será una superestrella / Cansado de los insultos de Don Cangrejo, Calamardo renuncia a su empleo

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja deberá probar que es rudo para poder ingresar a la Escupidera de Salty / Calamardo convierte el Crustáceo Cascarudo en un restaurante muy fino .para impresionar a su rival de la secundaria, Calamarino Elegante.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Después de ver una película en la noche en donde los robots se apoderan del mundo, Bob Esponja está convencido de que Don Cangrejo es un robot / Bob Esponja y Patricio Estrella se vuelven padres de un bebé molusco

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio tienen que pintar el living de la casa de Don Cangrejo, sin dejar que caiga una gota de pintura / En este episodio, aprenderás como lograr convertirte en un empleado del Crustáceo Cascarudo

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Con su nuevo kit de planee su propia fiesta, Bob Esponja decide organizar una fiesta en grande. Nadie se la pasa bien hasta que Bob Esponja se queda encerrado fuera de la casa

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio Estrella ponen un negocio de venta de barras de chocolate puerta a puerta / Chico Percebe está muy enojado, porque siempre lo tratan como un bebé y nunca lo respetan

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: El Sr. Hyuhn y Ernie Oskar unen sus recursos para comprar un caballo de carreras. Cuando el padre de Rhonda le compra a su madre un abrigo de piel por su cumpleaños, la tentación es demasiado grande y Rhonda se lo pone para ir al colegio.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Los chicos roban cohetes del laboratorio de ciencias del colegio y los lanzan fuera de una antigua comisaría de policía. El nuevo propietario de la tienda de delicatessen está buscando un nuevo jefe de cocina que sea un auténtico hombre de familia.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: El abuelo inscribe su Packard en el concurso de coches clásicos. Todos lo admiran hasta que alguien lo admira tanto que decide robarlo. Phoebe está a punto de recibir un premio por su asistencia perfecta.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: El Sr. Simmons gana el premio al Profesor del Año y The Knowledge Channel quiere hacer un documental que capture los momentos espontáneos de su clase./Big Bob cambia de opinión cuando sufre lo que parece ser un ataque al corazón.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Rhonda utiliza su predictor matrimonial de origami para adivinar quién se casará con quién dentro del grupo.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold encuentra el viejo diario de su padre. A través del diario, Arnold conoce a sus padres por primera vez y finalmente siente que ha cerrado ese capítulo.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold y Gerald actuarán de banana y fresa en la obra escolar, los cuatro grupos alimenticios, dirigida por Helga. Ellos deciden escapar de la obra y faltar. / Arnold accidentalmente arruina la nueva bicicleta de Eugene.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Helga, accidentalmente, deja caer su libro de poemas de amor de Arnold entre los libros de Gerald y deberá recuperarlo antes de que Arnold descubra quién es la autora. / Toda la clase va de paseo al acuario.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Criminology student Imette St. Guillen was dedicating her life to catching killers when she herself was caught by one while celebrating her birthday late at night at a bar in Lower Manhattan.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Millionaire banker and mother-of-two Shele Covlin has it all, until she fatally slips and falls in her Upper West Side bathtub; days after her burial, information emerges, and the NYPD realizes this may be no accident.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Realtor to the stars Linda Stein is found bludgeoned to death in her apartment, but her larger-than-life personality meant Linda made enemies as well as admirers; with evidence from the crime scene, only painstaking sleuthing can identify her killer.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a retired cop is found shot to death on a subway train in Brooklyn, detectives soon discover that his death is linked to two other seemingly random shootings in the previous thirteen hours.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a sibling dispute over money turns into a double murder, all of Brooklyn is on alert for the missing killer; days turn into months and then years, as the NYPD manhunt turns into a national and international chase for the fugitive.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found hidden in tall reeds in a quiet park near her home, fear grips the Queens neighborhood; after months of ceaseless investigation, a clue from the past leads NYPD detectives to an unexpected killer.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Days before the New Millennium, a jailed informant calls the NYPD with a cryptic tip about a murder, sending detectives on a hunt through dozens of New York's high-rise buildings, in search of a crime scene - and a body.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Two young women come to New York with big city dreams, but a chance encounter triggers a sequence of events that shatters those dreams forever; detectives must piece together a series of puzzling clues to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Roger Brooks, popular maître d' at one of the oldest restaurants in New York, is found slain in his apartment on the city's famous Restaurant Row; detectives discover a hidden side to the victim, and the chilling possibility of other victims.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a young banker disappears, police piece together her final moments, leading them to a professional who's not as he presents himself.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: After the brutal murder of a beloved Queens gay man, a community bands together while a detective goes undercover to catch the killers.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Everyone in East Harlem knows Jason Adams and is shocked when his body is found stabbed; detectives are stumped until a tip from an unexpected source points them toward the killer.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Talented performer Jennifer Stahl and four friends are discovered shot execution-style above New York's iconic Carnegie Deli in the theater district; when the news breaks, the entire city fears there's a cold-blooded killer on the loose.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: A mass shooting in Chelsea leaves one dead and three injured; the detective discovers this is the latest in a series of murders spanning multiple precincts; investigators find themselves plunged into the underground world of New York's bouncers.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: NYPD detectives race to unravel the strange murder of one of their own before a devious killer slips out of the country.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: An indie film star is found dead in Greenwich Village, the victim of an apparent suicide; as detectives discover one eerie clue after another, they realize things aren't what they seem.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When police discover two murdered lovers in East Harlem, a stolen phone leads them on a journey into the heart of New York's criminal underground and beyond.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Tornados are one of the most destructive forces of the planets with winds at 300 miles an hour. They can destroy buildings and hurl cars hundreds of feet through the air.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Return to the Moon
programme.desc: The moon is our closest celestial companion. It lights our night sky and gently tugs at our shores. Few have walked on her surface, but her allure remains strong.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between our planet and our star. Mercury and Venus make up half of our terrestrial planets, but we still know very little about them. As we take a closer look at our companions, we find more questions than answers.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: Mars has fired our imagination for thousands of years. The tantilizing possibility of life has made it the most inviting planet in our solar system. It is the only other place that man may one day call home.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our solar system 4.5 billions years ago, there remain many clues to reveal its evolution. Remnant debris, asteroids, and comets are what's left of the building blocks to our celestial neighborhood.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Gas Giants
programme.desc: In the cold, dark expanse of our solar system, beyond the asteroid belt, lie the giant planets. Some can be seen with the naked eye, others have been visited by our camera. What secrets do they hold?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympus
programme.desc: There are many more worlds in our solar system than just the planets. The mysterious moons of the gas giants may hold much more than we ever imagined. Each one is unique, and each one deserves a scrutinous eye.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: The sun bathes our planet in warmth and light. It powers the machinery of nature, our weather, and it encourages and sustains life on land and at sea. We study it closely, and it can reveal the secrets of all other stars.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Exo Planets
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer more closely and with evermore fidelity at nearby stars, they are discovering countless exo planets. How many Earth-like planets are out there? Could one of them hold life not so different from our own?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Silent Partner
programme.desc: Although we have put man on the moon, our silent partner still holds many mysteries. What haven't we seen? What haven't we discovered?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Rocky Shores
programme.desc: The arid shores of other planets tell the stories of their past. What did they look like, and could they have ever supported life?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fountain of Creation
programme.desc: Without the Sun's warmth and light, life as we know it would not exist. It is the powerhouse of our planet and provides the energy we need to survive.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Windows to Other Worlds S1 Ep1
programme.desc: As technology has advanced, we have been able to peer into distant reaches of space. From the first telescopes to high-tech satellites, these machines have been our windows to other worlds.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: Discover the most powerful telescopes on the planet as they search for the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.desc: ¡Ash enfrenta a su más duro oponente hasta ahora en el Campo de Planta en la Liga Pokémon! ¿Están él y su Bulbasaur listos para enfrentar a su oponente y a su poderoso Scyther?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash conoce a un Entrenador parecido llamado Richie en la Liga Pokémon, los dos chicos pronto se vuelven amigos cercanos, ¡al igual que sus dos Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡En la quinta ronda de la Liga Pokémon, Ash y Richie se enfrentan uno al otro! ¿Sobrevivirá su amistad esta importante batalla?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Misty y Brock están en las gradas vitoreando a Richie cuando la Liga Pokémon llega a su fin y marchan juntos en las ceremonias de clausura. ¡Es una experiencia que acompañará a Ash durante todo su viaje como Entrenador!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos regresan a Pueblo Paleta con una gran bienvenida, ¡sólo para ser enviados a otro viaje de inmediato! El Profesor Oak busca una misteriosa Pokébola, y le pide a Ash, Brock y Misty que la encuentren para él.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Los chicos deben viajar a la Isla Valencia para traer una misteriosa Pokébola para el Profesor Oak. Cuando Ash gana un viaje gratis en dirigible, parece que sus penurias terminaron, pero, ¿quién pilotea esta cosa?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras un aterrizaje forzoso en la Isla Valencia, los chicos van al laboratorio de la Profesora Ivy, donde está la misteriosa Pokébola. Brock se asombra al descubrir que la profesora y sus colegas también son criadores Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Gracias a la canción de Jigglypuff, el dirigible de Ash y Misty da vuelta a casa, se sale de curso y se estrella en una isla, donde conocen a un nuevo amigo llamado Tracey mientras intenta ayudar a un Lapras perdido.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Misty y Tracey salen a explorar las Islas Naranja, ¡y Ash está decidido a calificar en la Liga Naranja! Pronto descubre que los desafíos del Equipo Naranja son un poco diferentes a las batallas de otros gimnasios.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash, Misty y Tracey llegan a la Isla Mandarina, Pikachu y Togepi se rebelan y se unen a unos Pokémon furiosos. Cuando los Pokémon desaparecen, la Oficial Jenny les habla de la desaparición de docenas de Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash encuentra un mensaje en una botella, el cual lleva a nuestros héroes a una nueva aventura en la Isla Sunburst, y a la búsqueda de un Onix muy especial.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes se encuentran en la Isla Pinkan, hogar de un gran número de Pokémon de colores extraños. Ash y Tracey quedan fascinados con estos Pokémon rosas… ¡al igual que el Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras unirse a una expedición científica para investigar el fósil de un Kabuto, Ash y sus amigos pronto se encuentran enfrentando una serie de desastres naturales.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Otro especialista en los Pokémon tipo Agua reta a Misty a una batalla y le ofrece un consejo: ¡él cree que el Psyduck de Misty está listo para evolucionar!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes conocen a una muy ocupada Enfermera Joy quien debe saltar por toda la isla para cuidar de todos los Pokémon del área. ¿Podrán ayudar a protegerla del Equipo Rocket?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: En el segundo reto de Ash contra el Equipo Naranja, él debe escalar una montaña, construir un trineo y ganar una carrera de trineos. ¿Sus Pokémon tienen lo necesario para superar estos obstáculos?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: La exploración de nuestros héroes los lleva a las Islas Toronja, ¡donde se enteran de que la famosa fruta de la isla ha estado desapareciendo! Ash, Misty y Tracey salen a atrapar a quien sea responsable.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Cuando los buzos recuperan un antiguo trofeo de Campeonato de la Liga Naranja, nuestros héroes van directo al museo de arte donde se exhibe para verlo! Desafortunadamente, el Equipo Rocket ya se les adelantó…

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: El Equipo Rocket se estrella en una isla y Meowth es el centro de atención pues lo confunden con el "Gran Meowth Pródigo", una poderosa criatura de la cual habla una profecía. ¿Qué sucederá cuando descubran la verdad?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Misty no está contenta cuando nuestros héroes aterrizan en una isla llena de Pokémon tipo Insecto, aunque Ash y Tracey la pasan muy bien. Cuando encuentran a un Scyther herido, ¿podrá Misty superar su disgusto y ayudarlo?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash y sus amigos encuentran una maravillosa isla repleta de muchos tipos de árboles frutales, deciden tomarse un descanso y disfrutar su botín. Claro que el Equipo Rocket tiene otra idea…

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.desc: While answering a distress call, Picard finds himself not sure of exactly who he is dealing with, but he's sure he's NOT dealing with the planet's version of The Devil, as she claims to be.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix is faced with the decision of a lifetime when Voyager locates a tribe of exiled Talaxians on a distant asteroid.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway is held hostage by aliens who force the Doctor to help them steal Voyager's warp core.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager's quest to return home is aided by a visitor from the future – Admiral Kathryn Janeway.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway risks Voyager's shortcut home in order to destroy the Borg and save millions of lives.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: While searching for a missing officer, Captain Kathryn Janeway and the crew of the Starship Voyager are swept 70,000 light years from home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew launches a daring rescue mission to save two officers trapped in a subterranean city facing disaster.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tensions rise between the merged Starfleet and Maquis crews when the ship becomes trapped inside a star that's collapsed upon itself.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: When Paris and Janeway are sent back in time, they must decide whether to violate the Prime Directive by warning residents of a planet facing annihilation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix faces certain death when an alien race stricken by a devastating plague "harvests" his lungs.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew discovers that a nebula is not what it seems, and Paris invites his fellow officers to share a little "R&R" in his holodeck program.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The discovery of a wormhole in deep space raises the crew's hopes of finding a shortcut home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After Paris is convicted of a murder he swears he didn't commit, Tuvok must play detective to clear him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kim confronts life and death issues when he's held against his will by an alien race.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: An alien leader has the technology that could send the crew 40,000 light years closer to home -- but refuses to share it with them.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a mission to find a weapon that will defeat their powerful foe, the team finds a planet whose inhabitants were killed by a mysterious illness, and unwittingly fall victim to the illness themselves. Starring Ben Browder and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 travels to the Pegasus Galaxy and the city of Atlantis in hopes to find a clue to a weapon that can destroy the Ori. Starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, Christopher Judge, Claudia Black, Beau Bridges, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The team makes a pact with an old enemy to fight their common foe, and the results are disastrous. Starring Ben Browder as Lt. Colonel Cameron Mitchell, Christopher Judge as Teal'c, and Amanda Tapping as Lt. Colonel Samantha Carter.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 struggles to control a rash of brutal attacks by an elusive and savage alien creature. Starring Ben Browder as Lt. Col. Mitchell, Amanda Tapping as Lt. Col. Carter, Christopher Judge as Teal'c, and Michael Shanks as Dr. Jackson.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Summoned to a planet by a communication code, the team is ambushed by Kolya, who has now created his own faction of Genii after being forced from the inner circle. While the rest of the team manages to escape, Sheppard is taken prisoner.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay is called back to earth to convince his estranged sister, Jeannie Miller, to assist the Air Force. McKay and Jeannie travel to Atlantis and begin the experiment which is initially successful until a McKay from the parallel universe appears.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Major Leonard's team fails to check in with Atlantis while on a mission. Following the energy readings in hope of finding Major Leonard and his men, McKay leads the team into a cave to discover that the cause the energy spike is a Wraith generator.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The now awakened Ancients meet with O'Neill and Woolsey, thanking them for taking care of the city but also asking them to vacate Atlantis. While Ronon and Teyla stay in the Pegasus galaxy, the rest struggle to resume their lives on Earth.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: O'Neill and Woolsey, the lone survivors of the replicators' bloody coup, hide out in an abandoned section of the city. Knowing Landry has an order to nuke Atlantis if a foothold situation should ever arise, the two lay low awaiting their fate.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Teyla begins to see apparitions of ancients in distress and believes they are the ghosts of the Ancients recently massacred by the Replicators. McKay believes he's found the whale that saved him a year ago while trapped in a submerged puddle jumper.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team hear of a great warrior with stories of defeating both the Genii and Wraith and seek him out in hopes of making a new ally. But when they learn this great warrior is none other than Lucius they believe he's up to his old tricks again.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Trying to preserve power by turning off all the non-essential systems the Ancients recently activated before being killed by the replicators, McKay mistakenly is hit by an energy beam from a mysterious device.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Locked in a battle with a Drone Command Ship, the Destiny is surprised by the arrival of the aliens that abducted Rush and Chloe. After Destiny's position is revealed, the crew again comes under heavy attack. But this time, they have a plan.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Excitement spreads through the ship as Eli believes he’s found a way to dial Earth. But Dr. Rush has serious reservations about abandoning Destiny, and when the crew is interrupted by a distress call, it may just change the plans of the Destiny.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: A fantasy episode in which Strawberry, Rainbow Sherbet, Blueberry Muffin, Coco Calypso, and Seaberry Delight imagine themselves as Mermaids, drawn into a grand adventure.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake’s friendship letter to children worldwide elicits Crepes Suzette's invitation to visit Pearis and the Pieffel Tower.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Raspberry finds a way to enlarge the Berrykins to the same size as Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum, determined to win a Dance-Off trophy, tries to get her friends and the Berrykins to dance just like a rival dance team, and learns that different people have different skills.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Blueberry gives a First Frost Day 'secret' gift that's more what she wants than what her giftee wants, a hot-potato of passing on the unwanted gift occurs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the 'Glimmerberry Gathering,' until she learns the true meaning behind the festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the town needs a larger venue for their upcoming Glimmerberry Ball, Plum finds an ideal hollow tree for the occasion.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon creates super-duper musical neon manicures, Glamicures. At first the other girls love them, then, because they are so bright and noisy, they begin to dislike them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When a new game comes to Berry Bitty City, it starts to encroach on the other activities of the community. It falls to Orange to figure out how to give everyone in town their fair share of access to the public spaces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a Singer and puts on a concert that cheers everyone up! // When Thunderbell forgets to mail invitations to his secret-swap-present party, Rainbow Ruby devises a plan to deliver them just in time.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the field is covered in pokey pods before a rainbow ball tournament, Rainbow Ruby creates a golf game to whack the pods out of the field. // When things go missing in Rainbow Village, it's up to Detective Rainbow Ruby and Choco to find the culprit.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Ruby becomes a Pilot to help Chirpee see what it's like to fly, like other birds. // Rainbow Ruby becomes a Fashion Designer and finds the perfect solution to Paige's fashion catastrophe.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: To help Ellie overcome her stage fright, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Dance Teacher to help her friend take part in a dance-a-thon. // When the new fairy won't stop playing a game of hide-and-seek, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Baker to draw her out with the aroma.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One windy day, a tiny fairy named Sherry Bobbleberry gets blown into Strawberry’s open window.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Apple Dumplin’ wants to help Strawberry & her Friends with the baking. But Dumplin’s just a little too little to be much help. In fact, she ends up making a pretty big mess of things.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the urging of Honey Pie Pony, Strawberry & Friends decide to put on a Cooking Show.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s that time of year when the berries are about to burst into bloom – and it looks like this will be a bumper crop!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance – and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Sadiebug and Kadiebug create a new club, a 'Good Citizens Club,' Plum is suckered into doing their bidding, thinking that it's a 'test' for good citizenship.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry have trouble collaborating on a decorating project, which causes all kinds of chaos... until they learn about teamwork.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Terribly worried when her beloved pets don't return home, Strawberry puts on a brave face so as not to worry her friends as they all search for the pets.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Orange's store is overflowing with Berrykin Bloom's new line of Berry Bitty Fruits & Veggies. Confident she can tackle any challenge, Orange tries to deal with everything herself.

programme.desc: Strawberry's new produce marketplace goes under construction. Strawberry is so grateful to her girlfriends for helping her with a new bedroom atop the marketplace, that she accommodates all their ideas and neglects to include her own!

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The stress of the Race begins to take its toll when a Double U-Turn is revealed, and one Team struggles to consume a local delicacy while others become acquainted with Swiss hospitality.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams brave bone-chilling temperatures as they come face-to-face with the world famous Matterhorn, and tempers flare in the most intense argument of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four Teams mix it up in Brazil where Racers cry out in pain during a hairy situation as this season comes down to a race to the finish line when one Team will be crowned the winners and receive the 1 million dollar prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Emmy Award-winning The Amazing Race sets off for a new global adventure as Teams depart for Taipei, Taiwan. Plus, one team's position in the game is put in serious jeopardy when they lose their passport less than an hour into the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When Racers discover that for the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history there is a double elimination, they are forced to step up their game. However, costly mistakes jeopardize multiple teams' chances at staying in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team is stranded in Indonesia as they watch their competition race by, and two Teams join forces to push through a mind-numbing mental challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams struggle with an underwater challenge which threatens their positions in the game, and one team’s love for the outdoors comes in handy during a tough climbing challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Fearing they have broken the rules, one team takes a risk that could cost them the Race. Meanwhile, an unwanted speed bump turns into a dream excursion for Liz and Marie, but will it push them even farther back.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After falling to the back of the pack, a disheartened racer is encouraged by the spirit of the local workers, and it’s an intense foot race to the first-ever Pit Stop in Malawi.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Malawi where a puzzling patriotic Roadblock causes one team to fall behind. Also, with a Double U-Turn on the line, teams must choose whether to sabotage their fellow Racers for a chance at first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race travels to Copenhagen for the first time, where one Racer learns the meaning of two left feet and a double U-turn jeopardizes team positions in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After a potentially game-changing error, one team hopes for a lucky break, and donning only a Speedo for their Detour task, Racers get in touch with their inner exhibitionists.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers put the pedal to the metal and shift into high gear when they take a thrilling test drive, and results are far from sweet when teams also try to recreate classic Belgian waffles.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Two fast girls from Mt. Pilot get a speeding ticket and enjoy the attention they get from the law officers.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Comedian Don Rickles guest stars as Newton Monroe, an itinerant peddler who seems unable to do anything right.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife helps Opie with his schoolwork, using a teaching method all his own.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie tries to win a birthday present for his father at a carnival, not realizing that the carnival shooting gallery is crooked.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Jerry Van Dyke, brother of Dick Van Dyke guest stars as a carnival's destitute banjo player. He also proves to be an inept lawman when he is hired in Barney's Fife's absence.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's son, Opie, demands that their new housekeeper, Andy's aunt, be fired after the old one leaves to get married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives the state troopers a lesson in the efficiency of a county sheriff when a dangerous criminal escapes.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A hometown guitar player auditions with a dance band in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker, a pretty young graduate pharmacist, moves to Mayberry to help her uncle out in the local drugstore.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy thinks Ellie is out to marry him. After a series of misunderstandings, Andy finally takes Ellie to the church picnic.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives his son, Opie, a lecture on keeping promises, but must break one of his own in order to persuade a runaway kid to come home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Ellie stage a hold-up at the drugstore so that Barney can impress Miss Rosemary with his heroics.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
